emergency_definition: no heat when it's under 40 degrees outside
non_emergency_routing_rules: take a message - name, number, and what it's about
integration_constraints: do not create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade
do not create gas line estimates in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls are routed to on-call tech, non-emergency calls are taken as messages
special_rules: escalate to Mike directly if caller is really upset or threatening
If someone specifically asks for an estimate for a new construction project, take their info and tell them we'll have our estimator, Paula, call them back.
notes: Ace Plumbing and HVAC handles residential plumbing and HVAC work, with specific emergency and non-emergency call handling rules

added: new ServiceTrade constraint: do not create gas line estimates
new special rule: new construction project estimates
new greeting: Ace Plumbing and HVAC, serving Austin since 1998
